docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $700.62 FILED BY MACMURRAY PACIFIC AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JUAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-02-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-02-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MACMURRAY PACIFIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JUAN $700.62 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $785.62, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-08-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JUAN
